description: Buyer marketplace, cart, checkout, orders, saved produce, profile, transactions, notifications, and AI support

buyer-marketplace.description: Product grid, personalized feed, product detail, manage interests modal

buyer-checkout.description: Delivery address, payment (card/bank/mobile), order success & failure

buyer-orders.description: My Orders tabs, track order with map, order details, buy again, leave review

buyer-saved-produce.description: Empty state and saved favorites grid/list views

buyer-profile.description: Profile overview and edit/personal info modals

notes: Supersedes buyer-marketplace-hold screens from batch 1 (2 older marketplace grids)
Shared nav across dashboards: Marketplace · My Orders · Saved Produce · Transactions
